shorts.title: You might be double-dosing right now ⚠️
shorts.description:
If you take NyQuil AND Tylenol, you're taking Tylenol TWICE.

NyQuil already has acetaminophen (Tylenol) in it. So does DayQuil. So does Theraflu.

Too much acetaminophen is the #1 cause of liver failure in the US.

This is why you need to know what's actually in your cold medicine.

shorts.title: The PM scam: every PM medicine is the same trick 💤
shorts.description:
Advil PM = Advil + Benadryl
Tylenol PM = Tylenol + Benadryl
Aleve PM = Aleve + Benadryl

The word "PM" literally means they added one Benadryl and doubled the price.

Advil PM: $12
Regular Advil + generic Benadryl: $7 (and way more pills)

shorts.title: DayQuil and NyQuil differ by ONE pill 💊
shorts.description:
DayQuil and NyQuil are the same recipe. The only difference? NyQuil adds one Benadryl to make you sleepy.

Day vs night = one pill.

Buy generic DayQuil ingredients. At bedtime, add a Benadryl. Congratulations — you just made NyQuil.
